summary: Dashboard module testing complete for FlipSlab Engine. All 5 backend endpoints pass tests, and all frontend features are working correctly. Dashboard loads by default, KPI cards display real data, Recently Scanned shows card images with PSA grades, Price Movers shows percentages, Flip Opportunities has eBay links, and sidebar navigation works.
passed_tests: GET /api/dashboard/stats - returns 200 with all required KPI fields (total_cards, estimated_value, total_listings, flip_opportunities, etc.)
GET /api/dashboard/recent - returns 200 with recently scanned cards including card_name, grading_result, front_image_preview
GET /api/dashboard/movers - returns 200 with price movers including search_query, latest_price, price_change_pct
GET /api/dashboard/opportunities - returns 200 with flip opportunities including title, price, listing_url, image_url
GET /api/dashboard/ebay-market - returns 200 with live eBay Browse API data including items array
Dashboard page loads by default when visiting app root URL - PASS
KPI cards display correctly: Est. Value ($3.1k), Cards Scanned (3), eBay Listings (33), Opportunities (4) - PASS
Recently Scanned section shows 3 card images with PSA grades (8.9, 8, 9) - PASS
Price Movers widget shows price change percentages (128.5%, -97.4%, +19.2%, -7.0%) - PASS
Flip Opportunities section shows listings with eBay links and prices - PASS
Sidebar navigation works - clicking 'Flip Finder' navigates correctly - PASS
View All and Monitor links are present and functional - PASS
Refresh button on dashboard reloads data - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard module well implemented with proper data-testid attributes for testing
All API endpoints follow RESTful conventions with proper error handling
Frontend correctly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from environment
Price change calculations show proper positive/negative indicators with color coding
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing MongoDB data (3 card analyses, 33 eBay listings, 5 watchlist cards)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard module fully tested. Existing data: 3 cards scanned (1999 SkyBox APEX Kobe, 2000 Upper Deck Kobe, 1996 Upper Deck SP Kobe), 5 watchlist cards, 33 eBay listings. All 5 dashboard endpoints working. KPIs: Est Value $3.1k, 33 listings, 4 opportunities. Sidebar navigation between Dashboard and Flip Finder verified working.

backend_endpoints./api/dashboard/movers: PASS - Returns price movers with percentages
backend_endpoints./api/dashboard/ebay-market: PASS - Returns live eBay API data
